title: The Original Gluggle Jug - Orange Glug Jug in XL, 28cm 1.4L - Gug Glug Fish Shaped Jug - Decorative Glugging Water, Cocktail, Wine & Gin Pitcher, Decanter or Vase - Hand Made in Britain
features: Bright and bold: The Orange Gluggle Jug adds personality to your space with its vivid color and famous gurgling pour.
Functional meets fun: Its XL size holds 1.2 litres of liquid – perfect for entertaining or showing off as a playful statement piece.
A pop of color: This glossy orange glaze brings joy to dining rooms, garden tables or creative interior spaces.
Color – orange: A bold, vibrant shade with a glossy finish – perfect for warm interiors, statement pieces or eclectic décor styles.
Durable and dishwasher safe: Made of high-quality ceramic and fired at 1200 °C for long-lasting use; food-safe and certified for everyday functionality.
description: Make a statement – The Orange Gluggle Jug Lively and bold, this XL pitcher in vibrant orange brings a splash of energy and design flair to any setting. Its signature gurgle sound adds a playful twist to water serving and home décor alike. Perfect for entertaining or display, the XL size reduces refills while adding visual interest to your space. Made in England by ceramic artisans Striking orange glaze – full of personality 1.2 litre XL capacity – 27.5 cm tall Food-grade ceramic, dishwasher safe Stamped original with guaranteed glug
